text: There is a kind of quiet awe that fills me as I enter this place. The deliberate display of 'R + D'—Research and Development—suggests a celebration of human curiosity and creativity. Surrounded by glass walls and vivid colors, I sense the convergence of past knowledge and future innovation, inviting contemplation on how humanity relates to technology. I feel curious, slightly humbled, as if I am standing at the precipice of discovery and reflection.
